message:
refactor(ext-*): adapt all 6 extension crates to Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> SqliteValue

Mechanical migration following the SqliteValue type change from
String/Vec<u8> to Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]>. Every extension crate that
constructs SqliteValue::Text or SqliteValue::Blob is updated:

- ext-fts5: highlight, snippet, source_id, cursor column, and test
  assertions now use Arc::from() instead of String::to_owned()
- ext-icu: icu_upper/icu_lower return Arc::from(result.as_str())
- ext-json: All json_* scalar functions, json_each/json_tree table
  rows, json_to_sqlite_scalar, sqlite_to_json, jsonb encode paths,
  and text_arg/normalize_arrow_path_arg patterns updated. Blob
  iteration uses b.iter() for Arc<[u8]>. text.clone() replaced
  with text.to_string() where String is needed.
- ext-misc: All scalar function returns adapted
- ext-rtree: Virtual table column output adapted
- ext-session: Changeset value construction adapted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
